zh.lifeSummary: 當James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond於1480年6月1日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里丁格爾時，他的父親Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond35歲，母親Lady Ellen Roche16歲。他於1507年之前與Amy Turlogh O'Brien在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年6月18日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里特拉利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond于1480年6月1日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克里丁格爾时，他的父亲Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond35岁，母亲Lady Ellen Roche16岁。他于1507年之前与Amy Turlogh O'Brien在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1529年6月18日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克里特拉利。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: When James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond was born on 1 June 1480, in Dingle, County Kerry, Ireland, his father, Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond, was 35 and his mother, Lady Ellen Roche, was 16. He married Amy Turlogh O'Brien before 1507, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 18 June 1529, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Tralee, County Kerry, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond est né le 1 juin 1480, à Dingle, County Kerry, Irlande, son père, Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen Roche, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Amy Turlogh O'Brien avant 1507, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 18 juin 1529, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Tralee, County Kerry, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond am 1. Juni 1480 in Dingle, County Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond 35 und seine Mutter Lady Ellen Roche 16. Er hat vor 1507 in Irland Amy Turlogh O'Brien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Juni 1529 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tralee, County Kerry, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond è nato il il 1 giugno 1480 nel Dingle, County Kerry, Irlanda, il suo padre, Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Ellen Roche, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Amy Turlogh O'Brien prima del 1507, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 18 giugno 1529, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmondが1480年6月1日にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーディングルで生まれた時，父Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmondは35歳，母Lady Ellen Rocheは16歳であった。1507年以前にアイルランドでAmy Turlogh O'Brienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年6月18日に故郷で49歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ケリートラリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond(이)가 1480년 6월 1일 아일랜드 카운티 케리 딩글에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ellen Roche(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1507년 이전 아일랜드에서 Amy Turlogh O'Brien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 6월 18일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 케리 트라리에 묻혔다.

mn.1 June 1480–18 June 1529: 1480 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 1–1529 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 18

pt.1 June 1480–18 June 1529: 1 de junho de 1480–18 de junho de 1529
pt.lifeSummary: Quando James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond nasceu em 1 de junho de 1480, em Dingle, County Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ellen Roche, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy Turlogh O'Brien antes 1507, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de junho de 1529, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond родился 1 июня 1480 г. в местности дингл, коунти кирри, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen Roche, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy Turlogh O'Brien перед 1507 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 18 июня 1529 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности треили, коунти кирри, Ирландия.

es.1 June 1480–18 June 1529: 1 de junio de 1480–18 de junio de 1529
es.lifeSummary: Cuando James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond nació el 1 de junio de 1480, en Dingle, County Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, Maurice Fitz Thomas 9th Earl of Desmond, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Ellen Roche, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Amy Turlogh O'Brien antes de 1507, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 18 de junio de 1529, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.
